title: betula × intermedia
intro: Betula × intermedia, also known as the hybrid birch, is a cross between the paper birch (Betula papyrifera) and the silver birch (Betula pendula). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Betula × intermedia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an antiseptic to heal wounds. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, including tea, salves, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the bark or leaves in hot water.
